name: compra-coletiva
description: Sistema de gerenciamento de compras coletivas

scripts.migrate:deploy:container: docker compose exec backend npx prisma migrate deploy --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.test:ci:lgpd: npm run test:unit:lgpd --workspace=backend && npm run test:unit:lgpd --workspace=frontend
scripts.lint:ci: npm run lint --workspace=backend && npm exec --workspace=frontend -- next lint --no-cache
scripts.build:ci: npm run fix:build-output-perms && npm run build --workspace=backend && npm run build --workspace=frontend
scripts.ci: npm run lint:ci && npm run test:ci && npm run build:ci
